parameters.content:
## 03 — Reactivation Engine

Fires daily at 7am America/Toronto. Pulls all customers from Square, classifies into 9 segments, AI drafts the SMS in Charlie's voice, and queues them to send during sane hours (9am–8pm). Plus a weekly fleet/dealership outreach nudge to the owners.

**Segments:**
1. 90-day in-season nudge
2. 180-day in-season nudge
3. 365-day winback (with 10% returning-customer rate)
4. Pre-season early-access (Mar 15 + Apr 1)
5. End-of-season ceramic push (Aug 1)
6. Salt-season interior recovery (Apr 15)
7. Maintenance plan upsell (after 3rd service)
8. Family plan upsell (multi-vehicle households)
9. Fleet/dealership outreach reminder (Slack to owners)

**Exclusions:** customers tagged `do_not_engage`, `discount_seeker`, `complainer` are skipped.

**Quiet hours:** never sends SMS before 9am or after 8pm Eastern. Schedules forward.

**Credentials:** Anthropic, Twilio, Square, Slack.

parameters.text:
=Customer: {{ JSON.stringify($json) }}

Draft the reactivation SMS per your system prompt. Return JSON only.

options.systemMessage:
=See prompts/reactivation-copywriter.md — paste full contents here.

Voice rules from voice-style-guide.md apply.

ALWAYS return strict JSON matching the output schema.

parameters.content:
## Weekly fleet outreach (Mondays 8am)

This side-trigger fires every Monday at 8am and posts a curated list of 3 fleet/dealer pitch targets to Slack.

It rotates through `data/fleet-targets.json` and won't repeat a target within 8 weeks.

Charlie/Kabir do the in-person walk-ins. The system tracks last_pitched dates so the rotation doesn't repeat.
